---
name: Feature Request
description: Suggest an idea for a new feature.
title: "Feature Request: [SHORT DESCRIPTION]"
labels: ["feature request"]
assignees: []
---

## Description

Please describe the feature you would like to request. What problem does it solve, or what benefit would it provide?

## Context

How do you envision this feature being used? Are there any specific use cases or scenarios where this feature would be applicable?

## Additional Information

Is there anything else you would like to add? Feel free to mention any thoughts, references, or related links that might be relevant to this feature request.
